name: Artillery Tycoon
short_description: Build and manage an artillery factory in the WWI era. Research authentic weapon components, engineer deadly firepower, test prototypes on your firing range, and compete for lucrative government contracts. From the French 75 to the German 7.7, your designs will decide the fate of nations.
detailed_description:
Development Journey and Future Plans

Artillery Tycoon: Development Journey & Future Plans

Our Commitment: Major updates every 3 months, with smaller patches as needed. We're building Artillery Tycoon the right way—systems first, polish ongoing, community-driven evolution.

✅ SHIPPED - December 2025 Update

The largest update to date. Artillery Tycoon evolved.


Gameplay Enhancements

  • Difficulty settings: casual entrepreneur to hardcore arms dealer

  • Skip tutorial option for veterans

  • Interchangeable parts system: mix and match components across gun models

  • Expanded global market: more nations buying your firepower

  • Rebalanced research costs for better progression

Visual Overhaul

  • Complete firing range rebuild with stunning new visuals

  • Redesigned artillery models with enhanced detail

  • Range indicator system: color-coded targeting feedback

  • Refreshed contracts screen: cleaner, more intuitive

Quality of Life

  • Authentic part and weapon designations for historical accuracy

  • Warehouse audio fix (the forklift beep is gone—sanity restored)

  • Dozens of smaller improvements and polish updates

✅ SHIPPED - November 2025

Biggest update pre-December. New mechanics and graphics overhaul.

  • New mechanics implemented and tested

  • Major graphics updates across multiple systems

  • Enhanced gameplay experience

  • Foundation laid for December's massive release

✅ SHIPPED - May 2025 Update

New Artillery Pieces

  • Feldhaubitz 14

  • British 18-pounder

New Features

  • Loan function for capital management

  • Sound effects added to key locations

  • Skip tutorial option

  • 5-shot series in shooting range for accuracy averaging

  • Increased game speed options

Improvements

  • Bug fixes and stability improvements

✅ SHIPPED - April 2025 - Alpha Launch

Core Systems

  • Research and production mechanics

  • Warehouse management system

  • Contract bidding and fulfillment

  • Shooting range with ballistic testing

  • Factory management foundation

Initial Artillery

  • French 75mm

  • British QF 18-pounder (84mm)

  • German 7.7 cm FK

✅ SHIPPED - March 2025

Pre-launch polish and expansion.

  • Updated main screen with more details

  • Improved artillery piece visual stages

  • Feature refinements for release readiness

  • Continued optimization and bug fixes

🚧 IN DEVELOPMENT - Coming Soon

Employee Management System Hire and fire engineers and workers. Manage skill levels, salaries, and morale. Your workforce impacts production speed and quality.

Battle Notifications & Feedback Detailed reports on how your artillery performs in real conflicts. Accuracy rates, destruction potential, reliability under fire. Watch your designs prove themselves on the battlefield.

World Map Integration Visual tracking of where your weapons are deployed. See which nations are using your designs. Track conflicts in real-time.

Manual Aiming & Advanced Testing Take control at the firing range. Manual aim mechanics for precision testing. Expanded ballistics simulation.

News & World Events System Dynamic world events. Track which nations are at war. Anticipate demand. React to breaking conflicts that create new contract opportunities.

Shipping & Logistics UPS won't ship artillery forever. Build your own logistics network. Manage transportation costs, delivery times, and reliability. Late deliveries = lost reputation.

Additional Artillery Pieces Continuous expansion of the arsenal. Historical accuracy maintained. Each update brings new weapons from different nations and eras.

Ongoing Graphics Improvements Mechanics first, aesthetics refined continuously. Every major update includes visual polish across multiple systems.

🔮 FUTURE VISION - Beyond Year One

New Eras & Conflicts Expand beyond WWI into new technological eras. New mechanics for each period. New opponents. New challenges.

Extended Side Content Additional systems to deepen immersion. More ways to build your empire. Features based on community feedback.

Community-Driven Features Your feedback shapes development. Suggest mechanics, request historical weapons, propose systems. We're listening.

💬 Stay Connected


Discord Community: Bug reports, feature requests, direct developer access

Steam Discussions: Share strategies, showcase designs, connect with players

Regular Updates: Development progress shared transparently

The forge never goes cold. The roadmap never ends. Artillery Tycoon grows with every update.


About the Game

The factory floor is cold. The forge burns hot. Nations are going to war, and they need guns.Artillery Tycoon drops you into the cutthroat world of military manufacturing at the dawn of modern warfare. You're not just building weapons—you're engineering the thunder that decides which flags fly and which empires fall.

ENGINEER

Design artillery from the ground up. Research authentic breech mechanisms, recoil systems, and firing platforms. Every component matters. Attach the hull. Select your crew—commander, gunners, loaders. Configure your ordinance. Test fire at the range. Miss, and you lose the contract. Hit your marks, and nations will pay fortunes for your firepower.

BUILD

Transform raw steel into instruments of war. Manage production lines running 24/7. Speed up time and watch your factory churn out the French 75, the British 18-pounder, weapons that will reshape battlefields across continents. Expand your facilities. Unlock new research. Automate production. Save your designs and scale up—from one prototype to an arsenal.

DOMINATE

Win contracts from governments desperate for an edge. Outbid rival manufacturers. Deliver on time or watch your reputation crumble. Every nation at war needs artillery. The question is: will they buy yours?There are no second chances when your weapons fail on the battlefield. There are no refunds when shells miss their targets. This is industrial warfare. This is capitalism with a body count.Your factory. Your designs. Your empire. Build it or die trying.
